checkin.journal:
Feeling groggy first half of day. In general okay, feels good to sleep more. Vocal cords okay but tight muscles around them.
Physical: Vocal cords okay but tight muscles around them, need logoped. Pelvic floor a little better. Petra treatment. Ping pong. Less pain in general.
Emotional: Feeling bloated 5/10. Slept 8 hours. Feel sleepy in evening, Amitriptyline works. Stopped Enterosgel, maybe why acidity returned.
Gut: Bloating 5/10. Acidity higher, took Ruporut 1/2. Stopped Enterosgel, maybe th
